players.name: Cal Raleigh
players.summary: Raleigh went 0-for-3 in a Mariners 3-2 win over St. Louis. His average sits at .171 — a slow start that has him behind the 300-AB pace that matters for the BA scoring formula.

sources.title: Mariners and Josh Naylor sneak past Cardinals, 3-2

players.name: Bryce Harper
players.summary: Harper hit his 5th HR of the season (solo, 5th inning) but the Phillies lost 5-3 to Atlanta for their 10th straight defeat. Zack Wheeler debuts Saturday, which could help the struggling rotation.

players.name: Luis Arraez
players.summary: Arraez went 3-for-4 with a stolen base as the Giants beat the Marlins on Friday. His average has climbed back to .303 after a slow start to the season.

sources.title: Marlins vs. Giants Box Score — April 24, 2026

players.name: Bo Bichette
players.summary: Bichette went 1-for-4 in the Mets' 4-3 loss to Colorado. Now leading off with Lindor on the IL, Bichette is carrying extra responsibility. His big Thursday (3-for-5, 3-run double) looks like the outlier; the team is struggling.

players.name: Francisco Lindor
players.summary: Lindor placed on 10-day IL with a left calf strain suffered Wednesday vs. Minnesota. He is in a boot for a week and won't be re-evaluated for 3 weeks (mid-May at earliest). Manager Mendoza called it 'tricky' — more serious than Soto's recent similar injury.

sources.title: Mets' Francisco Lindor placed on injured list with calf strain
Mets say Lindor to be evaluated again in 3 weeks

players.name: Pete Crow-Armstrong
players.summary: PCA singled to lead off the 9th and scored the go-ahead run on Dansby Swanson's 2-run HR as the Cubs completed a stunning 4-0 comeback to win 6-4 — their 10th straight victory. The Cubs are the hottest team in baseball.

sources.title: Cubs come back from 4 down to stun Dodgers, 10th in a row

players.name: Jackson Merrill
players.summary: Merrill had the day off as the Padres traveled to Mexico City for the April 25-26 series vs. Arizona. He went 1-for-3 in Thursday's rubber-match win over Colorado to finish the series.

players.name: Teoscar Hernandez
players.summary: Hernández went 1-for-4 as the Dodgers' bullpen squandered Sheehan's brilliant start. The Cubs used a 5-run rally in the late innings to win 6-4. No injury concerns.

sources.title: Cubs come back from 4 down to stun Dodgers, 10th in a row

players.name: Devin Williams
players.summary: Williams did not appear as the Mets lost 4-3 to Colorado. His 9.95 ERA remains alarming. An April 24 article from Last Word on Sports explored the team's conundrum with their expensive closer continuing to struggle.

sources.title: The Mets are in a Devin Williams Conundrum

players.name: Zack Wheeler
players.summary: Wheeler makes his long-awaited 2026 debut Saturday vs. Atlanta — his first start since thoracic outlet decompression surgery in September. He'll be limited to ~90 pitches. Fastball has been sitting 91-93 mph in spring, below his usual 96+.

sources.title: Phillies' Zack Wheeler: 2026 debut coming Saturday

players.name: Cole Ragans
players.summary: Ragans did not start Friday (Noah Cameron started for KC). Ragans owns a 6.00 ERA through 4 starts; his biggest issue has been command with 18 walks in 21 innings. Next start expected early next week.

sources.title: Cole Ragans 2026 Game Log — CBS Sports

players.name: Chase Burns
players.summary: Burns did not start Friday (Andrew Abbott went instead vs. Detroit). Burns has been one of the best starters in the NL, carrying a 1.62 ERA and 24 Ks through 3 starts. His next turn in the rotation is upcoming.

sources.title: Reds' Chase Burns Emerging as Dominant Pitcher in 2026

players.name: Nathan Eovaldi
players.summary: Eovaldi was shelled by Oakland — 3 solo HRs on just 7 pitches to open the game (Kurtz, Cortes, Soderstrom). He was pulled early and the A's cruised to an 8-1 win. It was the fourth time in his 15-year career he's allowed 3+ HR in a single inning.

sources.title: Athletics hit 3 solo homers on 7 pitches off Rangers' Eovaldi in 1st inning

players.name: Emmet Sheehan
players.summary: Sheehan was brilliant — 10 Ks in 6⅓ innings, 1 ER — but the Dodgers bullpen wasted it in a 6-4 Cubs loss. It was the most dominant start by any Dodger pitcher this season. The no-decision was unlucky; his ERA drops to 4.87.

sources.title: Cubs come back from 4 down to stun Dodgers, 10th in a row

players.name: Reid Detmers
players.summary: Detmers did not start Friday (Yusei Kikuchi started as Angels fell 5-3 to KC). Detmers is having a quietly strong 2026 season: 3.89 ERA, 39 Ks in 34⅔ IP through 6 starts. Pitches next turn.

sources.title: Angels vs. Royals Box Score — April 24, 2026

players.name: Giancarlo Stanton
players.summary: Stanton left the Yankees' 12-4 win over Houston in the 6th inning with right lower leg tightness after running gingerly to third base. Considered day-to-day; no imaging planned Saturday. Manager Boone said 'hopefully we got ahead of it.'

sources.title: Stanton exits game against Astros in sixth

injuries.name: Francisco Lindor
injuries.note: Placed on IL April 23 after straining left calf rounding third base vs. Twins. In a boot for one week; re-evaluation not until mid-May. Manager calls it 'tricky' and more serious than Soto's recent calf injury. Could miss 4-6 weeks.

source.title: Mets' Francisco Lindor placed on injured list with calf strain

injuries.name: Giancarlo Stanton
injuries.note: Left NYY@HOU game in 6th inning April 24 with right lower leg tightness. No imaging planned. Manager optimistic: 'just some tightness, hopefully we got ahead of it.'
